title: thymus broussonetii subsp. hannonis
intro: Thymus broussonetii subsp. hannonis, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the thymus plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin infections, due to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Thymus broussonetii subsp. hannonis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to promote overall health and well-being.
